name: New Testament History and Literature with Dale B. Martin
original_name: New Testament History and Literature with Dale B. Martin
overview: Yale Courses - This course approaches the New Testament not as scripture, or a piece of authoritative holy writing, but as a collection of historical documents. Therefore, students are urged to leave behind their pre-conceived notions of the New Testament and read it as if they had never heard of it before. This involves understanding the historical context of the New Testament and imagining how it might appear to an ancient person.

trailers.title: 1. Introduction: Why Study the New Testament?
